# libredash admin restore

Restore LibreDash from a validated instance backup

## Usage

```sh
libredash admin restore [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--confirm` | bool | `false` | confirm replacement of the configured LibreDash instance |
| `--current-out` | string | `` | path for a backup of the current instance before replacement |
| `--database-only` | bool | `false` | restore only the platform SQLite database |
| `--from` | string | `` | backup archive path to restore |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
